name: Silver Noodle Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/3 pound Pork butt or shoulder, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation: Marinate pork and ginger in thin soy sauce and sherry for 30 minutes.
2. Rinse chunk of Szechuan mustard green to remove all traces of chili coating; slice like the pork. The chili flavor will still be present, but in delicate balance with the mustard and pork.
3. Soak noodles in warm water for 15 minutes, then rinse and drain.
4. Stir-fry: Add oil to hot wok; when it just begins to smoke, add pork and ginger mixture. Stir-fry for 30 seconds.
5. Add Szechuan mustard green; stir-fry for 2 minutes.
6. Soup: In a 2-quart saucepan, bring water to boil. Add the hot pork stir-fry; simmer for 3 minutes.
7. Five minutes before serving, return broth to boil and add soaked noodles and minced coriander. Simmer for 3 minutes or until noodles are soft but not pasty.
8. Pour into serving bowl, garnish with coriander sprigs and sesame oil, and serve.
